notes: Gold standard — lowest margin bookmaker globally. Sharpest closing line. Widely used as benchmark.
Betting exchange — no bookmaker margin bias. Prices set purely by market participants.
Betfair fixed-odds arm. Closely tracks exchange prices.
Sharp-friendly. Known to accept sharp bettors longer than recreational books.
Largest volume globally. Line set competitively; moves with sharp money before recreational bettors see it.
Established sportsbook. Semi-sharp pricing on major markets.
European focus. Competitive odds on football markets with some sharp-tracking behaviour.
GVC/Entain brand. Recreational-focused pricing with higher margins.
Recreational. Part of GVC group. Softer lines than sharp books.
Recreational-focused. Sponsors heavily in entertainment markets.
Scandinavian recreational book. Softer odds; limited sharp action.
Recreational. Smaller book with wider margins.
High volume from recreational base. Irregular closing lines.
